build.buildCommand: cp .env.example .env && composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader && npm run build && php artisan storage:link && ([ -z "$APP_KEY" ] && php artisan key:generate --no-interaction || true)

deploy.startCommand: php artisan migrate --force && php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache && php artisan view:cache && php artisan queue:work --sleep=3 --tries=3
